{{CargoRelic
|name=The Golden Bough
|class_id=22873
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Golden Bough is a work exploring religious beliefs, rituals, and myths in primitive societies. The book provides a detailed analysis of folklore and religious practices worldwide, particularly those related to nature worship, agricultural rituals, and the succession of kingship. This book has had a profound impact on fields such as anthropology, folklore, religious studies, and literary criticism, providing important research references and serving as an inspiration for many literary works in later generations.
|fame=72
|art=64
|fth=67
|civ=107
|tech=52
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +3<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +4<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +5<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +7<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +9<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +12<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail ATK +12<br>prop@53196_2<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill2=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: This Relic's CIV +15
|skill3=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x Purple Card Drops +15%
}}
